context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the cachex-caching instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `Cachex.fetch/3` for get-or-set** — never check-then-set (race condition risk)

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use cache warmers for startup** — pre-populate expensive data when application starts

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Verify hit rate** — call `Cachex.stats/1` and confirm `hit_rate` is non-zero; see **Monitoring Cache Stats** for interpretation thresholds and remediation guidance

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Cachex operations return `{:ok, result}` or `{:error, reason}`. Always handle errors gracefully:
